legend.title: Map Legend

explore.drawPromptTitle: Draw a polygon on the map
explore.drawPromptBody: Click the polygon tool (top-right of map) to start drawing. Double-click to close the shape.
explore.card1Desc: Score your land's suitability for carbon credit generation through grazing management.
explore.econDisclaimer: Illustrative only — not live pricing, not investment advice.
explore.card2Desc: Rank all eligible land use practices for your AOI with scores for carbon potential, reversal risk, biodiversity, water, and soil health.
explore.card3Desc: Connect with investors and buyers actively seeking projects that match your land's profile, location, and regenerative potential.

score.modelComingSoon: Model coming soon for this activity
score.econDisclaimer: Illustrative only — not live pricing, not investment advice.
score.bufferNote: * Based on estimated {{ha}} ha ({{km}} km buffer)

suitability.title: Suitability Score
suitability.body: How well this land matches the conditions needed for the selected practice (climate, soil, terrain, land cover). 0–100 scale. Higher = better fit for the activity. Scored against climate, soil quality, terrain slope, and land cover rules.

carbon.title: Carbon Potential
carbon.body: Estimated tonnes of CO₂ equivalent that could be captured per hectare per year if the practice is adopted. Based on the suitability score applied to practice-specific carbon rates. Expected value is the mid-point estimate.

reversal_risk.title: Reversal Risk
reversal_risk.body: Probability that carbon stored could be lost due to drought, fire, or other events. Lower is better. Driven by climate drought index, fire risk, and terrain slope. This affects the risk-adjusted economic estimate.

confidence.title: Confidence
confidence.body: How reliable the score estimate is. Reduced when key input data (soil, climate, land cover) is missing or uncertain. A lower confidence means the score should be treated as indicative only.

activity.modelWarn: ⚠ Model coming soon for this activity. Only Prescribed Grazing and Regenerative Grazing are scored today.
